captions: I scored 0/100. No savings, no income, a 35% payday loan. I'm not in a hole — I'm in the Mariana Trench 🌊💀
0 out of 100. Payday loans at 35% APR trap 12M Americans yearly. I was one of them. The score doesn't lie 😬
Ground Zero hits different when it's your finances. Scored 0/100 and decided that's the last time I ever see that number 🔥
